mapper.select: SELECT strResIP, strResName, strS_IP, strS_PORT, strD_IP , strD_PORT, strS_MAC, strD_MAC, strProtocol, strIPv4ToS , strChannel, strSenderIP, strIn_Interface, strOut_Interface, strBytes_col , strCounts, dateRegDate FROM catchview.xe_sflow_logs WHERE dateRegDate > CONVERT(#{dateRegDate}, datetime) ORDER BY dateRegDate
SELECT intIndex, strResIP, strResName, strRank, strProtocol , strBytes, strUnit, dateRegDate FROM catchview.xe_sflow_protocol_log WHERE intIndex > #{interrIdx} ORDER BY intIndex
